The Hub · 1 NightAutoCamp
The Room 06 / 12
Where we sleep

The Rooms

Two ways to stay — both fully kitted. Pick your party.

A Explorer Suite Sleeps 4
  • Queen bed + pull-out sofa
  • Kitchenette, A/C, TV, Bluetooth & spa bathroom
  • Towels, toiletries & premium Tempur-Pedic bedding
B Premium Family Cabin Sleeps 6
  • Queen bed + twin bunks + pull-out sofa
  • Full kitchen, A/C, TV, Bluetooth & spa bathroom
  • Private fire pit & outdoor dining area
Suite or Cabin · Sleeps 4–6The Rooms
AutoCamp · The Kitchen 07 / 12
On-site restaurant & bar

The Kitchen

Full menu at the Clubhouse — swipe through food & drinks.

Swipe · Food → Drinks
The Kitchen · 7 AM – 10 PMDining
Thu Jun 18 · Dinner 08 / 12
Thursday Night

BBQ Night

We bring the full meat order and grill it ourselves at AutoCamp's firepits. Full shopping run on the next card.

Regular hot dogs Beef burgers / sliders Chicken burgers Green spinach burger Chicken skewers Thin chicken cutlets Skirt steak Club steak Salami
Grill at the FirepitsBBQ
Fri Jun 19 · Morning 09 / 12
Friday Morning

Breakfast

Two ways to do it.

1
AutoCamp Kitchen + General StoreOn-site
  • Complimentary coffee, tea & granola in the Clubhouse 7–10 AM
  • Continental spread: croissants, muffins, pastries, fresh fruit, yogurt
  • The Kitchen for purchase — toasted bagels, breakfast sandwiches, burritos, Greek yogurt bowls, warm grain bowls
2
Bring from homeKosher dairy / pareve
  • Cereal, milk, OJ, bread, PB&J, cream cheese, bagels, granola bars, fruit, coffee
  • Paper plates, cups & utensils
Each suite has a kitchenette for light prep & storage.
Fuel Up Before CheckoutBreakfast
Fri Jun 19 · Drive Home 10 / 12
Friday · One last dip

Two Ways
Home

Get in the water before the drive — pick your adventure. The group decides.

A Full Lake Day

Lake Minnewaska

Crystal-clear sky lake in the Shawangunk Ridge — the full swim-beach day.

BeachOpens Jun 19 · lifeguards 11:15 AM – 6:45 PM
Cost$10 per vehicle — not per person
Drive~40 min · New Paltz, NY · ~200 ft walk to sand
Open in Google Maps → Reserve Park Pass → Recommended to book in advance — spots are limited
B Quick Waterfall

Schalks Falls

Natural waterfall on Plattekill Creek in West Saugerties — short walk from the road, scenic, great for kids.

DriveMinutes from AutoCamp — barely a detour
CostFree
VibeA quick waterfall dip on the way out
Open in Google Maps →
Lake or Falls · Group DecidesFriday

Before You Go 12 / 12
Pack light, pack smart

What
To Pack

  • Bathing suits + towels for the waterSplashDown + Minnewaska
  • Clothing — layersHoodie / sweatshirt for Catskills evenings
  • Sandals / water shoes
  • Waterproof sunscreen
  • Bug spray
  • Headlamps
  • Road snacks & drinks
  • Charcoal + lighter fluidFor the BBQ firepit grill
  • Grilling utensils — tongs & spatula
AutoCamp provides towels, toiletries, bedding, pillows & comforters — pack light for the room. Bring your own beach/pool towels for the water days.
Two Water Days · One NightPacking
